title: Subitems automation
excerpt:
Hi, I know there is coming an update for subitems automation. 
Is it already possible to use the sub-item status in the item in an automation?

posts.author: RobvanHees (Rob van Hees)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I know there is coming an update for subitems automation.

Is it already possible to use the sub-item status in the item in an automation?

subitems1321×404 48.5 KB

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @RobvanHees, good question! It’s not possible to use the mirrored subitem status in an automation, because there could be multiple subitems so there would be multiple status “triggers” for the automation, which wouldn’t work. Does that make sense?

Can you let me know which automation recipe you were looking to use? I’d love to see if I can provide an alternative solution here

posts.author: RobvanHees (Rob van Hees)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @TRB-monday.com

No it doesn’t make sense to me.

I think subitems are part of the item.
This means that when all subitems are satisfied your item can get a status of 100%.

Then it makes sense that the (head) item (like any other item) can participate in an automation?
